creator: lars.eggert@nokia.com
text:
I'm currently without access to a machine that I could test this patch on. Commit and watch for bug reports or wait for me to test things in January.

Lars
--

NEW JABBER: lars.eggert@googlemail.com

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
